{{Quote|Remember Starkid's law…''war is good for business''!|Zoltan Starkid|<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" />}}
[[Director/Legends|Director]] '''Zoltan Starkid''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] was the top salesman of the [[Millennium Astro-Engineering plant]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tharkos]].

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
He tried to sell Millennium's newest prototype, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
{{Noncanonend}}
